examples.text: شُكْرًا عَلَى دَعْوَتِكَ لَنَا إِلَى الْمَقْهَى.
examples.english: Thank you for inviting us to the café.
They opposed his call and sought to kill him.

examples.text: لَهُۥ دَعْوَةُ ٱلْحَقِّ وَٱلَّذِينَ يَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِهِۦ لَا يَسْتَجِيبُونَ لَهُم بِشَيْءٍ إِلَّا كَبَـٰسِطِ كَفَّيْهِ إِلَى ٱلْمَاءِ لِيَبْلُغَ فَاهُ وَمَا هُوَ بِبَـٰلِغِهِۦ وَمَا دُعَاءُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَـٰلٍ
examples.english: To Him [alone] is the supplication of truth. And those they call upon besides Him do not respond to them with a thing, except as one who stretches his hands toward water [from afar, calling it] to reach his mouth, but it will not reach it [thus].1 And the supplication of the disbelievers is not but in error [i.e., futility].
